---
title: "Spatial Point Processes: Theory and Applications"
subtitle: "GEO-002 | Track B — Geospatial"
description: "The mathematical theory of random collections of points in space. Point processes model event locations: disease cases, tree positions, earthquake epicenters, crime incidents, and neural spike locations."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Spatial Point Processes: Theory and Applications

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
